caption: A man with grey, spiked hair and glasses is seated in a room that appears to be a clothing store, with shirts and "LEE" branded apparel visible on racks and mannequins in the background. He is wearing a white dress shirt, brown suspenders, and a small red bow tie, with large black over-ear headphones resting on his head. He is speaking into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. Across the bottom of the scene, a logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "GOSS TALK JOY" is visible, accompanied by smaller text that reads "PODCAST". The man maintains a consistent position throughout the sequence, though his facial expression and mouth movements change as he speaks. The background and equipment remain static, while the man's head shifts slightly as he talks.
